author: Stephanus Brulefer (Étienne Brulefer)
title: Altissimorum misteriorum missae...brevis et utilissima declaratio
editions: Opuscula reverendi magistri fratris stephani brulefer (Paris, 1500), pp 217--252r
remarks: Master of theology in 1482, then moved to Metz and Mainz where in the 1490s he gave new courses on the Sentences based on Bonaventure. Possibly this work arises from his lectures on Book IV.
